creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text: When I run FreeBSD 12-CURRENT r336739 on a homebuilt PC with an Asus H87M-E motherboard and try to use the UEFI Bootloader if I have my main partition as ZFS, I get stuck at the BootOrder line. I do not have this problem on the same computer in BIOS/CSM mode or when booting via USB with UEFI, nor do I have this problem on a HP EliteBook 1040 G3 in UEFI mode with ZFS on Root.
